hero.subtitle: We produce cutting-edge digital solutions integrated with AI.

mission.title: Driven by Evolution
mission.p1: Elevate your image with a professional photography service that combines premium quality with a simple and intuitive booking process. Whether you are looking for a photo shoot for your personal portfolio, social media, or corporate profile, we connect you with the best professional photographer to capture your essence with the ideal dress code — from formal to smart casual.
mission.p2: Our commitment is total transparency: we offer results of excellence through a flexible bonus credit system and a highly affordable investment, comparable to the price of 2 coffees. Ensure your personal brand stands out with clarity, style, and maximum professionalism, regardless of the language or country you are in.

product.title: What is Polly?
product.p1: Polly is our specialized solution for professional branding. We noticed that many talented professionals miss opportunities simply because they lack a high-quality profile photo.
product.p2: We combined advanced generative AI with professional photography principles to create a tool that turns everyday selfies into studio-grade headshots in minutes.

values.title: Why choose us?
values.v1Desc: Designed for simplicity and ease of use.
values.v2Desc: Advanced AI models for realistic results.
values.v3Desc: Your data is secure and automatically deleted.

otherSolutions.title: Our Other Solutions
otherSolutions.subtitle: Explore our ecosystem of AI-powered tools designed to enhance productivity and creativity.
otherSolutions.s1Desc: Bring old black & white memories back to life. Instantly colorize and animate vintage photos with stunning realism.
otherSolutions.s2Desc: The ultimate AI study companion. Generate comprehensive summaries, flashcards, and study guides from any text or document.
otherSolutions.s3Desc: Unleash your imagination. Generate high-fidelity images from text prompts with our Nano Banana Pro engine.

Privacy.title: Polly Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro:
At Polly, a SaaS platform for professional portrait optimization, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy describes the types of personal information we collect, how we use and share it, and the choices you have regarding the use of your information.
By using Polly, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
Privacy.s1Text:
We collect information to provide and improve our services. The information can be divided into:
• Personal Data: Information that directly identifies you, such as name, email address, payment information (if applicable), and photos you upload for AI processing. The submitted photos are used to generate professional photographs and are treated confidentially.
• Non-Personal Data: Information about site usage, such as IP address, browser type, browsing data, style preferences, and editing history. We use cookies and similar technologies to collect this data.
• Third-Party Data: We integrate with APIs like Replicate for AI processing.
We do not collect sensitive data, such as health, race, or belief information, unless inherent in the submitted photos, and we handle this data with the utmost care.
Privacy.s2Text:
We use the collected information to:
• Provide the services: Process your photos using AI to generate optimized photographs, including features like background removal, smile adjustment, eyes, lighting, and background change.
• Improve the service: Analyze usage to optimize the workflow and the recursiveness of the AI engine.
• Legal compliance: Respond to legal obligations or protect our rights.
• Storage: Save generated images in the "Recent Generations" gallery for persistence and state management.
The submitted and generated photos are stored temporarily for interactive editing purposes.
Privacy.s3Text:
We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:
• Service Providers: Third parties like Replicate API for AI processing, hosting providers, or analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics), under contracts ensuring data protection.
• Legal Authorities: If required by law or to prevent fraud.
We ensure that any sharing complies with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), if applicable.
Privacy.s4Text:
Your data is stored on secure servers in the EU or in regions with adequate levels of protection. We use security measures like encryption, firewalls, and access control to protect against unauthorized access. However, no online transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
Images generated with low denoising strength (0.15-0.35) are designed to preserve your facial identity, but we recommend not uploading sensitive photos.
Privacy.s5Text:
According to the GDPR and similar laws:
• Access and Correction: You can access or correct your personal data.
• Deletion: You can request the deletion of your photos and data (unless required for legal purposes).
• Objection: You can object to processing for marketing.
• Portability: You can request the transfer of your data.
To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below. We will respond within 30 days.
Privacy.s6Text: We use cookies to improve the user experience, such as to manage sessions and track preferences. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.
Privacy.s7Text: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. If we learn that we collected data from children, we will delete it immediately.
Privacy.s8Text: We may update this Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or on the site. The date of the last update will be at the top.
Privacy.s9Text: For questions about this Policy, contact us at: geral@polly.photo.

Terms.title: Polly Terms of Use
Terms.intro: Welcome to Polly! These Terms of Use govern your access and use of our SaaS professional portrait optimization platform, including the website, AI services, and associated features ("Services"). By accessing or using the Services, you agree to comply with these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Services.
Terms.s1Text: Polly allows you to transform casual photos into professional corporate photographs using AI, with a workflow based on Image-to-Image (img2img). It includes features like background removal, smile adjustment, eyes, lighting, and background change, using our AI models and APIs. The Services are provided "as is", without guarantees of perfect results.
Terms.s2Text: To use the Services, you may need to create an account by providing accurate information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities on your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
Terms.s3Text:
• Uploads: By uploading photos or other content ("User Content"), you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, store, process, and modify that content solely to provide the Services (e.g., generating professional photographs).
• Ownership: You retain all rights to your original User Content. We do not claim ownership of your photos or generated photographs.
• Responsibility: You guarantee that the User Content does not violate third-party rights, laws, or is illegal. Do not upload offensive, illegal, or privacy-infringing content.
Terms.s4Text: If the Services involve payments, you agree to pay the applicable fees. Payments are processed by secure partners. We do not refund except in cases of proven technical failure.
Terms.s5Text:
You may use the Services for legitimate personal or professional purposes. Prohibitions include:
• Using for illegal, fraudulent, or malicious purposes.
• Reverse engineering, copying, or modifying the AI software.
• Overloading the servers or interfering with the service.
• Sharing accounts or reselling the Services without permission.
Terms.s6Text: All rights to Polly, including the AI engine, code, and designs, belong to us or our licensors. We grant no implied rights beyond what is expressed in these Terms.
Terms.s7Text: The Services are provided "as is". We do not guarantee they are error-free, uninterrupted, or that the generated photographs are perfect (e.g., without facial distortions). We are not responsible for indirect, consequential damages, or data loss.
Terms.s8Text: We may terminate or suspend your account for violating these Terms. Upon termination, you lose access to saved content, unless previously exported.
Terms.s9Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of Portugal (or EU, if applicable). Disputes will be resolved in the courts of Portugal.
Terms.s10Text: We may update these Terms. We will notify you of significant changes. Continued use implies acceptance.
Terms.s11Text: For questions, contact us at: geral@polly.photo.
